name: CeraVe Foaming Facial Cleanser
description: A gentle foaming cleanser that removes dirt, oil, and makeup without disrupting the skin's natural protective barrier.

name: CeraVe Hydrating Facial Cleanser
description: A hydrating cleanser that helps restore the skin's natural moisture barrier while gently cleansing.

name: La Roche-Posay Toleraine Hydrating Gentle Cleanser
description: Minimal-ingredient cleanser designed for reactive skin.

name: Fresh Soy Face Cleanser
description: A gentle gel cleanser that removes impurities while maintaining the skin's natural balance.

name: CeraVe Daily Moisturizing Lotion
description: A lightweight, non-greasy moisturizer that provides long-lasting hydration and helps restore the skin's natural barrier.

name: CeraVe Moisturizing Cream
description: A rich, non-greasy, fast-absorbing cream that provides 24-hour hydration and helps restore the protective skin barrier.

name: La Roche-Posay Toleriane Double Repair Face Moisturizer
description: A lightweight moisturizer that helps restore the skin's natural protective barrier and provides long-lasting hydration.

name: Neutrogena Hydro Boost Water Gel
description: A refreshing gel-cream moisturizer that provides intense hydration and helps lock in moisture for a smooth, supple complexion.

name: The Ordinary Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1%
description: A serum that targets blemishes, congestion, and uneven skin tone, helping to improve the overall appearance of the skin.

name: The Ordinary Hyaluronic Acid 2% + B5
description: A hydrating serum that helps to plump the skin and improve its moisture retention, leaving it soft and supple.

name: The Ordinary Retinol 0.3% in Squalane
description: A gentle retinol serum that helps to reduce the appearance of fine lines, wrinkles, and uneven skin tone while improving skin texture.

name: SkinCeuticals C E Ferulic
description: A powerful antioxidant serum that combines vitamin C, vitamin E, and ferulic acid to protect the skin from environmental damage and improve the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.

name: La Roche-Posay Anthelios Melt-in Milk Sunscreen SPF 60
description: A lightweight, non-greasy moisturizer with broad-spectrum SPF 60 that provides hydration and sun protection for the skin.

name: EltaMD UV Clear SPF 46
description: A lightweight, oil-free sunscreen that provides broad-spectrum SPF 46 protection while calming and protecting sensitive skin types prone to discoloration and breakouts.

name: CeraVe Daily Moisturizing Lotion SPF 30
description: A lightweight, non-greasy moisturizer with broad-spectrum SPF 30 that provides hydration and sun protection for the skin.

name: The Ordinary Salicylic Acid 2% Solution
description: A targeted treatment that helps to exfoliate the skin, unclog pores, and reduce the appearance of blemishes and congestion.

name: The Ordinary Glycolic Acid 7% Exfoliating Toner
description: An exfoliating toner that helps to improve skin texture and radiance by gently removing dead skin cells and promoting cell turnover.

name: The Ordinary Mandelic Acid 10% + HA
description: A gentle exfoliating serum that helps to improve skin texture and radiance by promoting cell turnover and providing hydration.

name: Neutrogena On-the-Spot Acne Treatment
description: A fast-acting spot treatment that contains benzoyl peroxide to help reduce the size and redness of pimples and prevent future breakouts.

name: Paula's Choice Acne Spot Treatment
description: A targeted spot treatment that contains salicylic acid to help reduce the size and redness of pimples and prevent future breakouts.

name: L'Oréal Paris EverPure Sulfate-Free Moisture Shampoo
description: A sulfate-free shampoo that gently cleanses and nourishes color-treated hair while providing moisture and shine.

name: SheaMoisture Curl & Shine Shampoo
description: A sulfate-free shampoo that gently cleanses and nourishes curly and coily hair while enhancing natural curl definition and shine.

name: Kérastase Curl Manifesto Bain Hydratation Douceur Shampoo
description: A nourishing shampoo that gently cleanses and hydrates curly hair while enhancing natural curl definition and shine.

name: L'Oréal Paris EverPure Moisture Conditioner
description: A sulfate-free conditioner that provides moisture and nourishment to color-treated hair while enhancing shine and manageability.

name: SheaMoisture Curl & Shine Conditioner
description: A nourishing conditioner that provides moisture and nourishment to curly hair while enhancing natural curl definition and shine.

name: Pattern Beauty Intensive Hydration Conditioner
description: A rich, nourishing conditioner that provides intense hydration and nourishment to coily hair while enhancing natural curl definition and shine.

name: SheaMoisture Curl Enhancing Smoothie
description: A popular curl cream that enhances curl pattern and reduces frizz.

name: John Frieda Frizz Ease Extra Strength Serum
description: A powerful serum that helps to tame frizz and flyaways while providing intense hydration and shine for curly hair.

name: Briogeo Don't Despair, Repair! Deep Conditioning Mask
description: A deep conditioning mask that provides intense hydration and nourishment to dry, damaged hair while improving its overall health and appearance.

name: SheaMoisture Manuka Honey & Mafura Oil Intensive Hydration Hair Masque
description: A deeply nourishing hair mask that provides intense hydration and nourishment to severely dry and damaged hair while improving its overall health and appearance.
